body.title: Review + update machines DB model config for CPU-only swarm
body.result: Updated machines DB: akiendell llama3.2:1b→qwen2.5:7b + batch upgraded to DeepSeek; akiendelllinux + yogai7 batch set to erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest
body.description:
No box has a GPU. Current config: yoga9i=qwen2.5:7b/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B, akiendell=llama3.2:1b/qwen2.5:7b, yogai7=qwen2.5:7b/none, akiendelllinux=qwen2.5:7b/none. Gaps: (1) yogai7 and akiendelllinux have no batch model — set ollama_model_batch=erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest for both. (2) akiendell default is llama3.2:1b — upgrade to qwen2.5:7b. (3) Consider qwen2.5-coder:7b as batch model for coding tasks on CPU. Update machines rows in DB. T-swarm-model-sync will then pull the right models automatically.

Also: after DeepSeek is confirmed on all machines, update machines table in Postgres: SET batch_model='erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest' for akiendelllinux, yoga9i, yogai7. This ensures route("batch") returns the right model on all machines.
